reviews.comment:
Muy bien puesta la estación. Una especial felicitación para la chica que prepara el café, es extremadamente amable y cordial

(Translated by Google)
The station is very well set up. Special thanks to the girl who makes the coffee; she is extremely kind and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoN1lxOWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El ACA Sierra Grande, para mí , siempre fue un oasis. Un lugar de encuentro de viajeros patagónicos y turistas de cualquier parte del mundo.  Un oasis en la ruta nacional n° 3, la legendaria ruta patagónica de la costa," paralela" a la otra gran ruta nacional 40 del Oeste. Esta vez, con la agradable sorpresa de un desayuno con  medialunas recién horneadas . Mantienen su extrema amabilidad ;  la cajera, la camarera  y  todo el personal de playa.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA Sierra Grande, for me, has always been an oasis. A meeting place for Patagonian travelers and tourists from all over the world. An oasis on National Route 3, the legendary Patagonian coastal route, "parallel" to the other great National Route 40 to the west. This time, with the pleasant surprise of a breakfast of freshly baked croissants. They maintain their extreme friendliness; the cashier, the waitress, and all the beach staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocllmb0JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso parque para poder pernoctar, y comerte una rica comida a la parrilla, lastima no me pude quedar, estaba de paso, lo comparto para el que se pueda quedar, esta genial!!!

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful park to spend the night and eat a delicious grilled meal. It's a shame I couldn't stay. I was just passing through. I'm sharing it with anyone who can stay. It's great!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocmVmSUJBEAE
